programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When a young soldier goes missing just two days after his wedding, authorities fear the worst has occurred in their small Ohio town. Rumors of a sordid affair lead to a shocking betrayal that ended in not one, but two horrific crimes.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: A botched bank robbery and bomb-clad hostage lead Erie detectives through a bizarre, convoluted scavenger hunt that starts with a pizza delivery, ends with multiple victims, and was concocted by a deranged perpetrator who has plans to kill again.

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars
programme.desc: In a jailhouse interview, Traci Wolfe reveals the catalyst that sparked an uncontrollable rage and ended in her husband's gruesome death; holding nothing back, she now reflects on the crime that landed her in prison for life.

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence for the brutal stabbing of her own mother, Taylor Marks discusses the murder on camera for the first time ever; she claims she wasn't the mastermind behind the crime, but she knows who is.

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Just weeks away from completing his sentence, an inmate is accused of murdering his cellie; a large woman with a personality to match loses everything to meth; an inmate causes a disturbance on the jail's transfer bus.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw
programme.desc: Solitary confinement is one of the most common methods for disciplining inmates, but it's also a very controversial issue.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A look back at the 1997 murder of fashion designer Gianni Versace, including interviews with his long-time partner Antonio D'Amico, model Beverly Johnson, fashion journalist Hal Rubenstein, author Maureen Orth and more.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A look back at the 1997 murder of fashion designer Gianni Versace, including interviews with his long-time partner Antonio D'Amico, model Beverly Johnson, fashion journalist Hal Rubenstein, author Maureen Orth and more.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead after a party, his mother gets the help of a new friend to get the case in front of a jury.

programme.title: Dateline: The Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Three people are shot dead in a small Texas town, including two respected prosecutors; a clue that would connect the dots remains a mystery until an eagle-eyed investigator makes a stunning discovery.

programme.title: The Jury Speaks
programme.desc: The original jurors who found Hollywood legend Robert Blake not guilty of murder after the shooting of his wife Bonnie Lee Bakley discuss their controversial verdict over a decade later.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A sexy teacher and her teenaged lover hatch a plot that rocks a nation.

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A drug-crazed couple set off on a multi-state crime spree; a modern-day Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A salesman and young hustler form a partnership in business and in romance; when a medical tragedy proves to be anything but natural, police uncover a twisted tale of sex, deception and conspiracy.

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A couple of drifters befriend a good Samaritan with horrific results.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: Two ex-lovers reunite but their affair turns deadly when they conspire to get rid of his wife.

programme.desc: An honor student falls in love with an ex-convict and becomes involved in a killing spree.

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother falls victim to a brutal crime, the search for her killers reveals a torrid romance between two young lovers willing to do anything to get what they desire.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: The unexplained disappearances of a young mother and her two sons in 1980 lead investigators on a three-decade quest for justice, exposing multiple murders and a homicidal love affair that left untold suffering and carnage in its wake.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A loving couple are found shot to death in their home, forcing police to pursue a pair of desperate lovers on a cross-country manhunt.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.sub-title: Lori Smith & Eric Rubio and Amy Stevens & Paul Smith
programme.desc: When a young woman is found tortured and killed after a camping trip with friends, police must unravel two couples' conflicting stories of depravity to bring her killers to justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: After two best friends are reported missing, Texas and Minnesota police team up to bring a suspected serial killer to justice; an accomplice shares her side of the story from behind bars, revealing chilling details of the crime.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A violent home invasion leads to suspicion about the victim's stepdaughter and a mystery man, but a startling confession reveals a more intimate betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A popular cab-driver is shot dead on the job, but the search for his killer reveals his wife's secret prison visits, a torrid affair and a possible conspiracy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved widower leaves police wondering what secrets his marriage, to his much younger wife, might be hiding.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: An Air Force sergeant is gunned down in his garage revealing an elaborate conspiracy with an unlikely mastermind.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: A botched bank robbery and bomb-clad hostage lead Erie detectives through a bizarre, convoluted scavenger hunt that starts with a pizza delivery, ends with multiple victims, and was concocted by a deranged perpetrator who has plans to kill again.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: After a talented artist and musician goes missing, the investigation into his disappearance leads to a gruesome discovery in a historic Philly cemetery, revealing a sinister series of events.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: When a wife calls 911 to report her husband has been shot on a country road in Texas, officers rush to the scene.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.sub-title: Hinckley: Diary of a Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: Recently uncovered pages from John Hinckley Jr.'s diary, which he began writing after he was arrested for trying to assassinate President Ronald Reagan; an interview with the officer who questioned Hinckley after the attempted assassination.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: A man uses a dating site to meet and murder a college student.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: For Keith Morrison, this case stands out as an unusual mystery; the crime seemed arbitrary with no apparent motive; there was a confession which might have ended the investigation but that was only the beginning.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving grandmother from a traveling community is found brutally murdered, shocking all; investigators soon uncover a web of lies, identity theft and millions in insurance fraud that point to who killed this sweet old lady.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A man is found dead in the shower, and police have only two suspects, but to figure out who killed him and why, is not as cut and dry as it may seem.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: The abduction and murder of a pregnant woman and her fiancé from their Decatur home sends shockwaves throughout Atlanta; ransom calls and voicemails turn into digital breadcrumbs for investigators to track the killers down.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programme.desc: Twin daughters find their mother stabbed to death in their quaint suburban home, and the pressure for detectives to deliver justice is on; but when the shocking truth behind the murder comes out, the Atlanta community is left stunned and heartbroken.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When a beloved Staten Island mother vanishes, NYPD detectives have a gut feeling she didn't run off and have trouble believing she abandoned her family; as they retrace her last known whereabouts, CCTV footage leads them to a horrific discovery.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.sub-title: Murder on the Upper East Side
programme.desc: In the most expensive zip code in Manhattan, an aging, eccentric art collector is found strangled in his apartment.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When the owner of a Brooklyn pizzeria is gunned down in broad daylight in his backyard, the news publishes mafia theories, and the FBI joins the NYPD to investigate.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: A veteran police officer gets attacked in the line of duty; detectives make it their mission to bring his killer to justice; as they investigate a troubled Philadelphia suburb, they soon uncover a crime of the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Philly Homicide
programme.desc: When a hospital employee dies mysteriously on a Center City sidewalk, detectives uncover surveillance footage of the murder that leads straight to the doorstep of a suspected serial killer who may be tied to a string of unsolved crimes.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: Detectives in Washington, D.C., discover a puzzling connection between two women who disappeared two decades apart; an investigation reveals a sinister secret hidden along one of the busiest stretches of interstate in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead, police use blood evidence and computer forensics to convince a jury that the murderer is guilty.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly woman dies in an apparent robbery-homicide, evidence suggests the suspect broke out of the house rather than breaking in.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Wealthy man is shot dead while his wife is forced to open their hidden safe, but they couldn't be identified because they were wearing ski masks.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bomb was constructed to cause as much damage as possible, and it did, killing the victim with deadly force and flame; a painstaking search yielded tiny clues, which identified the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claims that she was abducted and sexually assaulted; her story seems unbelievable until police discover fibers on her clothing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man calls for help when his wife has a fatal fall down the stairs; numerous amount of bloodstains make police suspicious.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A decade old case reopens, and a few seconds of a 911 call enable investigators to determine who is responsible for a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A flawed envelope is an unlikely clue to identifying a killer who laced a water cooler with cyanide and caused the death of a woman.
